title: Fancy Crossbows
description: Adds Detailed Vanilla Model To Crossbows
body:
# What It Does?
This Resource-Pack adds updated crossbow **model & textures**!  
You can check gallery page to see how it looks like!

_-Full v1 made in 4 hours 30.08.2025_

And for V1 we have : 
- updated crossbow model to "automatic crossbow" like view.

For V1.1 we have:
- changed crossbow's texture to more iron-y.


Recomend to play with "Hold My Items" mod, with it animations look way to cool.    
Resource-Pack fully vannila but can be played with mods.

In feature i may change sounds update models and add more content here!
